page_content:
TLPL861 Seminar in Social Studies Education (3 Credits) Credit Only Granted for: EDCI820 or TLPL861. Formerly: EDCI820.

TLPL899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits) Registration required to the extent of 6-9 hours for an Ed.D. Project and 12-18 hours for a Ph.D. Dissertation. Formerly: EDPS899.
